HAKUREIREIMU-DANMAKU_STORM.title: Danmaku Storm
HAKUREIREIMU-DANMAKU_STORM.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
HAKUREIREIMU-DARKENED_PEARL.title: Orbs of Light, Cast into Shade
HAKUREIREIMU-DANMAKU_CHOJA.title: Danmaku Rich
HAKUREIREIMU-DANMAKU_CHOJA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Channel[/gold] {Repeat:diff()} [gold]Yin-Yang Orbs[/gold].
Add a copy of this card into your discard pile.
HAKUREIREIMU-DREAM_SEALING_SCATTER.title: Dream Seal -Scatter-
HAKUREIREIMU-DREAM_SEALING_SCATTER.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
If the enemy has [gold]Seal[/gold], apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
HAKUREIREIMU-TENHA_FUSHIN_KYAKU.title: Sky-Conquering Wind God Kick
HAKUREIREIMU-SEALING_NEEDLE.title: Sealing Needle
HAKUREIREIMU-TAI_YOKAI_HOI_TAIJI.title: Anti-Youkai Houi-Yoke Prayer
HAKUREIREIMU-TAI_YOKAI_HOI_TAIJI.descrip:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} extra damage for every [red]Debuff[/red] on the enemy.
HAKUREIREIMU-SHORYUKEN.title: Shoryuken
HAKUREIREIMU-DOUBLE_DANMAKU_BOUNDARY.des: Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Danmaku Barrier+|Danmaku Barrier}[/gold] into your hand.
HAKUREIREIMU-SUBSPACE_ACUPOINT.title: Dimensional Point Rift
HAKUREIREIMU-MUSHABETSU_CHOFUKU.title: Indiscriminate Exorcism
HAKUREIREIMU-DOUBLE_BOUNDARY.title: Double Barrier
HAKUREIREIMU-SNEAK.title: Sneak
HAKUREIREIMU-GENSO_BAUNDARI_KURAKKU.desc: Return a [gold]Counter[/gold] card from the battlefield into your hand.
HAKUREIREIMU-BACK_FLIP.title: Back Flip
HAKUREIREIMU-MAKE_NO_EXCEPTION.title: Make No Exception
HAKUREIREIMU-MAKE_NO_EXCEPTION.descripti: Applies target's [red]debuffs[/red] to ALL other enemies.
HAKUREIREIMU-DODGE.title: Dodge
HAKUREIREIMU-DODGE.description:
Can only be played if you have not played any [gold]Attack[/gold] this turn.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
HAKUREIREIMU-STRENGTH.title: Strength
HAKUREIREIMU-STRENGTH.description:
[gold]Counter Debuff[/gold] {Counter:diff()}.
[gold]Upgrade[/gold] {Cards:diff()} cards from the top of draw pile.
HAKUREIREIMU-TOSATSUSHA_CHOFUKU.title: Paparazzi Exorcism
HAKUREIREIMU-MENREIKI_DAI_CHOFUKU.title: Menreiki Exorcism
HAKUREIREIMU-MENREIKI_DAI_CHOFUKU.descri:
[gold]Counter Attack[/gold] {Counter:diff()}.
{IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Preemptively[/gold] |}Deal the attacker’s Intent total damage to ALL enemies.
HAKUREIREIMU-PERSUASION_NEEDLE.title: Persuasion Needle
HAKUREIREIMU-PERSUASION_NEEDLE.descripti:
Apply {SealPower:diff()} [gold]Seal[/gold].
Deal damage equal to it's [gold]Seal[/gold].
HAKUREIREIMU-MUSHO_MYOJU.title: Dream Orb
HAKUREIREIMU-MUSHO_MYOJU.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this triggers [gold]Yin-Yang Orbs[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
HAKUREIREIMU-DREAM_SEALING_GATHER.title: Dream Seal -Concentrate-
HAKUREIREIMU-DREAM_SEALING_GATHER.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Reduce this card's cost by 1 this combat.
HAKUREIREIMU-MUJIHI_HARAI_BO.title: Merciless Purification Rod
HAKUREIREIMU-MUJIHI_HARAI_BO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Seal[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt.
HAKUREIREIMU-YIN_YANG_STAMP.title: Yin-Yang Sign
HAKUREIREIMU-YIN_YANG_STAMP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have applied any [red]Debuff[/red] this turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
HAKUREIREIMU-HAKUREI_DANMAKU_BOUNDARY.de:
[gold]Counter ALL[/gold] {Counter:diff()}.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
if only once enemy, don't lose counts.
HAKUREIREIMU-DORAGONZU_ASUKAI_KIKKU.desc:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} less damage for every other card in your hand.
HAKUREIREIMU-LEAPING_YIN_YANG_JADE.title: Dancing Yin Yang Orbs
HAKUREIREIMU-LEAPING_YIN_YANG_JADE.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] when hit.
HAKUREIREIMU-YIN_YANG_JADE_MIDARE.title: Yin-Yang Dance
HAKUREIREIMU-YIN_YANG_JADE_MIDARE.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and [gold]Channel[/gold] {Repeat:diff()} [gold]Yin-Yang Orb[/gold] for every [gold]Yin-Yang Orb[/gold] you have currently.{InCombat:
(Repeats {CalculatedTimes:diff()} times)|}
HAKUREIREIMU-HAPPO_ONIBAKU_JIN.title: Omnidirectional Demon Binding Circle
HAKUREIREIMU-HAPPO_ONIBAKU_JIN.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Counter[/gold] on the battlefield.{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedTimes:diff()} times)|}
HAKUREIREIMU-MASHO_SENKETSU.title: Exorcising Border
HAKUREIREIMU-MASHO_SENKETSU.description:
[gold]Counter Debuff[/gold] {Counter:diff()}.
 Remove one of your [red]Debuff[/red], [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a [color=gray]Status[/color] or [purple]Curse[/purple] card.
HAKUREIREIMU-DANMAKU_SHASHIN_KINSHI.desc:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each enemy intent to attack.
Apply {InhibitPower:diff()} [gold]Inhibit[/gold] to each enemy NOT intended to attack.
{InCombat:
(Gain [gold]Block[/gold] {CalculatedTimes:diff()} times)|}
HAKUREIREIMU-KUJI_KOSHIN_HO.title: Nine-Syllable Self-Defense
HAKUREIREIMU-KUJI_KOSHIN_HO.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
ALL enemy's attacks will not consume [gold]Seal[/gold] this turn.
HAKUREIREIMU-DUEL.title: Duel
HAKUREIREIMU-UNCONSCIOUS_TELEPORTATION.d:
[gold]Counter Attack[/gold] {Counter:diff()}.
[gold]Preemptively[/gold] gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Block[/gold] is not removed at the start of your next turn.
HAKUREIREIMU-DREAM_SUBSPACE_HOLE.title: Dream Dimensional Rift
HAKUREIREIMU-DREAM_SUBSPACE_HOLE.descrip: Draw {Cards:diff()} [gold]Additional[/gold] cards the next time you draw any card.
HAKUREIREIMU-DIFFUSIVE_BOUNDARY.title: Expanding Barrier
HAKUREIREIMU-DIFFUSIVE_BOUNDARY.descript: Until next turn, Your attacks deal damage to ALL enemies.
HAKUREIREIMU-RANBO_NA_SEKAI_NO_SAKEMEGUC: Select a [gold]Counter[/gold] on the battlefield and [gold]Free[/gold] activate it {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} times.
HAKUREIREIMU-NO_INTERVAL_BOUNDARY.title: Narrowing Barrier of Avici
HAKUREIREIMU-NO_INTERVAL_BOUNDARY.descri: Shuffle {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:copy|copies} of all [gold]Counter[/gold] cards on the battlefield into your draw pile.
HAKUREIREIMU-DETER.title: Deter
HAKUREIREIMU-DETER.description:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
[gold]Stun[/gold] the Minions.
HAKUREIREIMU-FANTASY_MOON.title: Illusionary Moon
HAKUREIREIMU-FANTASY_MOON.description: Halved all attack damage received until next turn.
HAKUREIREIMU-YAKUYOKE_KIGAN.title: Disaster-Dispelling Prayer
HAKUREIREIMU-YAKUYOKE_KIGAN.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card.
If it is a [purple]Curse[/purple], permanently remove it from your deck.
HAKUREIREIMU-YOKAI_ASHIDOME_OMAMORI.desc: If the enemy has at least {SealPower:diff()} [gold]Seal[/gold], [gold]Stun[/gold] it.
HAKUREIREIMU-BARRIER_REVERSAL.title: Barrier Reversal
HAKUREIREIMU-ITARUDOKORO_NO_AOYAMA.title: The Home Where One Lays to Rest
HAKUREIREIMU-ITARUDOKORO_NO_AOYAMA.descr: Whenever you place a [gold]Counter[/gold] onto the battlefield, draw {ItarudokoroNoAoyamaPower:diff()} cards.
HAKUREIREIMU-BOUNDARY_SOLIDIFICATION.des: [gold]Counter[/gold] placed onto the battlefield will have its activation counts increased by {BoundarySolidificationPower:diff()}.
HAKUREIREIMU-SUKIMA_NO_MIKO.title: Shrine Maiden in That Gap!?
HAKUREIREIMU-YIN_YANG_GYOKUSHO.title: Yin-Yang King Piece
HAKUREIREIMU-YIN_YANG_ASUKA_I.title: Yin-Yang Asuka’i
HAKUREIREIMU-YIN_YANG_ASUKA_I.descriptio: Whenever [gold]Yin-Yang Orbs[/gold] deal unblocked damage, apply {YinYangAsukaIPower:diff()} random [red]Debuff[/red].
HAKUREIREIMU-SEALING_FORMATION.title: Evil-Sealing Circle
HAKUREIREIMU-SEALING_FORMATION.descripti: At the start of your turn, apply {SealingFormationPower:diff()} [gold]Seal[/gold] to ALL enemies.
HAKUREIREIMU-JINJA_HANJO_KIGAN.title: Shrine Prosperity Prayer Talismans
HAKUREIREIMU-DREAM_SEALING_INSTANT.title: Dream Seal -Blink-
HAKUREIREIMU-HAPPO_RYU_SATSU_JIN.title: Omnidirectional Dragon-Slaying Circle
HAKUREIREIMU-MUSHO_MYOJU_REN.title: Dream Orb String
HAKUREIREIMU-MUSHO_MYOJU_REN.description:
For each time target has taken damage this turn, deal {Damage:diff()} damage once.{IsTargeting:
(deal {CalculatedTimes:diff()} times)|}
HAKUREIREIMU-YIN_YANG_SCATTERING.title: Yin-Yang Scattering
HAKUREIREIMU-YIN_YANG_SCATTERING.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
If this triggers [gold]Yin-Yang Orbs[/gold], gain bonus damage equal to their damage dealt, and Return this card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
HAKUREIREIMU-COMBO.title: Combo
HAKUREIREIMU-COMBO.tip: The extra card played does not include this card itself, but can include cards played by allies.
HAKUREIREIMU-JUMP_THE_GUN.title: Jump The Gun
HAKUREIREIMU-JUMP_THE_GUN.description:
[gold]Play automatically at the start of combat[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
HAKUREIREIMU-WILD_EXORCISM_DANCE.title: Wild Exorcism Dance
HAKUREIREIMU-WILD_EXORCISM_DANCE.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {SealPower:diff()} [gold]Seal[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Repeat X times.
HAKUREIREIMU-SPRINKLE_STAR_SEAL.title: Sprinkle Star Seal
HAKUREIREIMU-SPRINKLE_STAR_SEAL.descript: Halve [gold]Buffs[/gold] and double [red]Debuffs[/red] on the target.
HAKUREIREIMU-ROLLING_IN_RICHES_HEART.des: Spend {Gold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold] to gain a [gold]Blind Box[/gold] at end of combat.
HAKUREIREIMU-REPEAT_CAST.title: Repeated Cast
HAKUREIREIMU-REPEAT_CAST.description: Return all other cards played this turn back into your hand in order.
HAKUREIREIMU-HELP_FROM_FRIENDS.title: Friends' help
HAKUREIREIMU-HELP_FROM_FRIENDS.descripti:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
 [gold]Retain[/gold] your hand and {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.
HAKUREIREIMU-CHEAT_BOUNDARY.title: Rule Violation Barrier
HAKUREIREIMU-CHEAT_BOUNDARY.description: Whenever you play a card this turn, [gold]Free[/gold] activate adjacent [gold]Counter[/gold] effects.
HAKUREIREIMU-CHEAT_BOUNDARY.tip: Activate Counter effects towards the trigger card's target.
HAKUREIREIMU-DREAM_INNATE.title: Innate Dream
HAKUREIREIMU-DREAM_INNATE.description:
[gold]Counter ALL[/gold] this turn only.
[gold]Preemptively[/gold] invalidate their actions.
HAKUREIREIMU-GENSO_ICHIJO.title: Fine Line Fantasy
HAKUREIREIMU-GENSO_ICHIJO.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Draw a card when this card drawn.
|}Swap a card from your draw pile with this card.
HAKUREIREIMU-DIFFUSIVE_SPIRIT_CHARM.desc: Until next turn, whenever you apply a [red]debuff[/red], apply the same amount to all other enemies.
HAKUREIREIMU-DIVINE_MIGHT.title: Divine Might
HAKUREIREIMU-YIN_YANG_KIJIN_GYOKU.title: Yin-Yang Kishin Orb
HAKUREIREIMU-YIN_YANG_KIJIN_GYOKU.descri: Whenever you play a card, [gold]Channel[/gold] {YinYangKijinGyokuPower:diff()} [gold]Yin-Yang Orb[/gold].
HAKUREIREIMU-UNFETTERED_FORM.title: Unfettered Form
HAKUREIREIMU-UNFETTERED_FORM.description:
At the start of your turn, draw {UnfetteredFormPower:diff()} additional cards.
 Whenever your Hand becomes [gold]Full[/gold] from drawing, a random card costs 0 this turn.
HAKUREIREIMU-KANZEN_HYOI_TO_YUMO_FUIN.de: Every {Div:diff()} [gold]Seal[/gold] on ALL enemies increase your damage by {KanzenHyoiToYumoFuinPower:diff()}.
HAKUREIREIMU-MUGEN_NO_KOSOKU_KIGAN.title: Fantastic High-Speed Prayer Talismans
HAKUREIREIMU-MUGEN_NO_KOSOKU_KIGAN.descr: Whenever a [gold]Counter[/gold] is placed onto the battlefield, activate it against a random enemy.
HAKUREIREIMU-DOUBLE_GREAT_BOUNDARY.title: Great Duplex Barrier
HAKUREIREIMU-DOUBLE_GREAT_BOUNDARY.descr: Whenever a [gold]Counter[/gold] is played, place a copy of it with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] onto the battlefield.
HAKUREIREIMU-RAINBOW_DRAGON_YIN_YANG_ORB: Choose 1 of 3 [gold]Yin-Yang Orbs[/gold] buffs to obtain for this combat.
HAKUREIREIMU-CELESTIAL_FLIGHT.title: Celestial Flight
HAKUREIREIMU-CELESTIAL_FLIGHT.descriptio: Enchant [gold]Light[/gold] to all cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Until the next turn, [gold]Double[/gold] the hits count of another player's [gold]Attack[/gold] cards.
HAKUREIREIMU-DREAM_SEALING_DIVINE.title: Dream Seal
HAKUREIREIMU-HAKUREI_PHANTOM.title: Hakurei Phantom
HAKUREIREIMU-HAKUREI_PHANTOM.description:
Cards are played twice.
Whenever you play a card, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
HAKUREIREIMU-RAINBOW_DRAGON_YIN_YANG_ORB: [gold]Yin-Yang Orbs[/gold] gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt.
HAKUREIREIMU-MIRACLE.title: Miracle
HAKUREIREIMU-DANMAKU_BOUNDARY.title: Danmaku Barrier
HAKUREIREIMU-SEAL.title: Seal
HAKUREIREIMU-BOUNDARY_CREATION.title: Barrier Creation
HAKUREIREIMU-BOUNDARY_CREATION.descripti:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Danmaku Boundary+|Danmaku Boundary}[/gold] to your hand.
HAKUREIREIMU-BASIC_STRIKE.title: Strike
HAKUREIREIMU-BASIC_DEFEND.title: Defend
HAKUREIREIMU-PLACEHOLDER.title: 占位符
